description: Installs the latest PowerShell (pwsh) via Winget or Chocolatey.

messages.notAdmin: This script must be run as Administrator.
messages.scriptDisabled: PowerShell installation is disabled in config.
messages.pwshDisabled: PowerShell install is disabled in config -- skipping.
messages.pwshInstallingChoco: Winget not available -- installing PowerShell via Chocolatey ({package})...
messages.pwshNotInPath: PowerShell installed but pwsh not found in PATH -- restart your terminal.
messages.completedWithWarnings: Completed with some warnings -- check output above.
messages.uninstallFailed: {name} uninstall failed -- package may need manual removal.
messages.uninstallComplete: Uninstall complete. Package removed, tracking purged.

commands.uninstall: Uninstall completely, remove tracking, clean up
